comment: "I love the swift pace of the course, it is great and gave me a framework that difficult airway algorithm hinges on the aspect of getting a difficult ventilation and intubation problem and attempting awake intubation is best. Preparation is key in that sense and also I liked how I get to be refreshed by the flowcharts."
"The layout is what I found most interesting."

"The most interesting aspects of this course were the in-depth exploration of healthcare systems and their impact on patient care, the practical case studies that provided real-world applications, and the emphasis on the evolving trends in healthcare management. I particularly enjoyed learning about the integration of technology in healthcare delivery, as well as strategies for improving organizational efficiency and patient outcomes. The course also offered valuable insights into policy-making and the role of leadership in shaping the healthcare landscape."
"For Anaesthesiologists this topic is the most important."

"I enjoyed the topics on preoperative discussions with the team, documentation of airway concerns, and clearly informing recovery staff and parents (as appropriate) are crucial parts of safe care. Also that any difficult airway event should be carefully documented and communicated for future care planning."
